# AIA CLI Development Instructions

This project follows the development guidelines outlined in our comprehensive developer guide.

**📖 Read the full developer guide:** [Developer Guide](../../docs/developer/codebase-dev-focused.md)

## Key Points for Contributors

- Follow the coding standards and project structure outlined in the developer guide
- Use the provided VS Code settings and extensions for consistency
- Follow the testing guidelines and ensure tests pass before submitting PRs
- Reference the debugging guide for troubleshooting common issues
- Use the performance tips to write efficient code
